company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform providing automated AI-powered video editing tools for content creators across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and more.
company.tagline: Edit smarter. Publish faster. Grow bigger.

plans.name: Basic Plan
plans.ideal_for: Hobbyists and beginners starting their content creation journey

plans.name: Pro Plan
plans.ideal_for: Professional creators and agencies managing high-volume content

policies.detail: Refunds are available within 7 days of purchase. No refunds are issued after 7 days from the purchase date.
24/7 live support is exclusively available on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support with a 48-hour response time.
Users can cancel anytime. Access continues until the end of the current billing period. No cancellation fees.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start the trial.
AutoStream supports exports optimized for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X.
All uploaded videos are encrypted and automatically deleted from our servers after 30 days unless saved to cloud storage.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade anytime and only pay the prorated difference for the remaining billing cycle.

faqs.question: What video formats does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV for both input and output.

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: There is no permanent free plan, but we offer a 7-day free trial for the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How does AI captioning work?
faqs.answer: AutoStream uses speech-to-text AI to auto-generate captions in 20+ languages with 98% accuracy. Available exclusively on the Pro plan.

faqs.question: Can I use AutoStream for multiple YouTube channels?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Pro plan supports 5 separate workspaces, each connectable to a different channel or platform.

faqs.question: Is there a team or agency plan?
faqs.answer: We offer custom enterprise pricing for teams of 5 or more. Contact our sales team at sales@autostream.io for a quote.
